text: Entering this space, I feel a strange sense of anticipation mixed with trepidation. The vivid colors and the luminous glow beyond the glass evoke curiosity, but the sterile, mechanical surroundings whisper of boundaries and containment. It is as if this threshold marks an entry not just into a room, but into ideas—an invitation to engage with something larger than myself, yet requiring vulnerability. My presence here feels significant, as though I am both witness and participant in an unfolding inquiry.
